name: airlock-platform-playbooks
author: Airlock Platform
description: Default operational playbooks that ship with every Airlock. Covers prospecting, onboarding, contract lifecycle, and agent task management.

playbooks.name: Otto Prospect Research
playbooks.description: Step-by-step workflow for Otto to research a prospect, enrich data, generate talking points, and draft outreach.

playbooks.name: New Workspace Setup
playbooks.description: Complete guide for a new Controller to set up their Airlock from first sign-in to first workflow.

playbooks.name: Vault Lifecycle (Chamber Transitions)
playbooks.description: How a Vault moves through Discover, Build, Review, Ship with gate criteria and approval requirements.

playbooks.name: Agent Task Templates
playbooks.description: Standard task formats for the coordination queue. Templates for feature implementation, bug fixes, security work, docs, and more.
